Task.nme: APP V19H Read First Patch Rules

Action.Str: V19H RULES: Patch every safe, doable non-UI guard/proof item now. Do not touch TextNow UI, AutoInput, waits, coordinates, click paths, search behavior, or send flow unless explicitly approved for a phone test. Work at best-work standard and document every change. Privacy boundary: user-approved or policy/safety only. WITH_KEY packages stay private/local; do not print keys. Temp/heavy tools are locked unless explicitly unlocked for a controlled test.

Task.nme: APP V19I Read First Proof Rules

Action.Str: V19I adds SendLog, HealthLog, AIWProofLog, AIWProofBoard, stop-branch proof markers, and 100-run selftest tools. It does not touch TextNow UI, AutoInput, coordinates, waits, click paths, paste/send steps, or contact search behavior. Proof logging is best-effort and should not break live work.

Task.nme: APP V19K Read First Master Rules

Action.Str: V19K is the only active source of truth. V19H/V19I/V19J are history compare only. Freeze working formulas, working queue pages, TextNow UI, AutoInput, waits, coordinates, click paths, paste/send, and contact search. Do not change working pages unless a phone test, sheet proof, or runlog proves the exact layer is broken. Before patching: verify current XML, list touched sections, list frozen sections, scan banned routes, and state PASS/FAIL. Known banned routes are project-blacklisted web-app/broker/final-process paths. Do not add them to any build. Proof/log sheets may be labeled, but formula/view tabs stay locked unless they crash.
LIVE COMPACTOR blocked simple logger act

Action.Str: LIVE COMPACTOR moved row:%CompSourceRow to row:%CompTargetRow

Before every heavy tool/build step: 1. Confirm V19K lock. 2. Verify active file path and task count. 3. Check memory/source rules for frozen parts. 4. Identify exact change target. 5. State what is NOT being touched. 6. Scan banned routes. 7. Scan missing task references. 8. Ask for proof if evidence is missing. 9. Do not rebuild working layers from assumptions. 10. Record worker notes so the next chat does not repeat the same mistake.

Known bug families to check before fixes: Ghost rows: blank ID/Sender/Message with status or reply. Literal variables: %arch_id1, %WDDeadData, %qv_sender, %antext, etc. written to sheets. Wrong recipient risk: sender/search mismatch or stale sendsearch. Duplicate rows: notification clear/update/same message too close. Stuck locks: PROCESSING/SENDING/AIWorkerBusy not released. Formula-page damage: QueueView/OpenSlotView/Overflow/DeadView formulas changed without crash proof. Missing sheets/headers: proof tools write into unlabeled columns. SafeMode confusion: held REVIEW_READY rows mistaken as send failure. JSON toggle risk: AutoSheets output JSON accidentally ON. Archive/DeadArchive/Compactor risk: disabled until controlled proof.

Before a new feature, generate failure cases first: What if a row is blank? What if sender is a number, name, or ticker only? What if TextNow search fails? What if OpenAI fails or returns malformed JSON? What if two messages arrive from same sender? What if a DONE row exists above NEW rows? What if AutoSheets returns literal variables? What if a sheet tab/header is missing? What if SafeMode is ON? What if live loop fires while a task is running? Build guards for these before the phone test when safe and non-UI.

Spreadsheet rule: Do not alter working formula/view tabs unless a runlog or sheet proof shows that exact tab crashed. Locked formula/view tabs: QueueView, OpenSlotView, OverflowView, OverflowSlotView, DeadView. Locked working data tabs: Sheet1, Archive, DeadArchive, OverflowInbox, Brain, Presets, Commands, Outbound. Allowed safe sheet work before proof: create missing tabs and add missing row-1 headers for proof/state logs only. Never clear existing proof/history unless user explicitly orders cleanup.

No-circles protocol: If a proposed fix touches something working, stop. If unsure whether a tab/task is formula-backed, ask for row 1/formula proof. If a bug was already solved, do not re-solve it from memory; check source notes or runlog. If a step fails, ask why the failure happened, not just what failed. Patch the reason the builder missed it, not only the surface bug. Every patch must leave notes: change, reason, proof, risk, next test.

When the builder makes a mistake: 1. Mark RESULT: FAIL. 2. Say exactly what was wrong. 3. Freeze all working layers. 4. Identify the missing rule or missing verification. 5. Add/update a source note or guard so it cannot repeat. 6. Do not move forward until the corrected safe next step is clear. 7. Never hide uncertainty or pretend a tool ran if it did not.

Before producing an XML/file patch, declare: File being patched. Sections touched. Sections not touched. Whether TextNow UI/AutoInput/waits/coordinates/contact search are untouched. Banned route scan result. Missing Perform Task reference scan result. Task count before/after. Reason for patch. Phone proof step after import.

Release gate checklist: APP Config Setup PASS. APP Status Snapshot PASS. Proof/state sheets exist and headers match actual writes. AIW SELFTEST All Proof Tools PASS. AIW SELFTEST State Tools 100 PASS. APP Reset Locks PASS. FINAL Simple one real notification PASS. Ghost rows check PASS. FINAL Process Sheet PASS. FINAL Send Sheet one safe row PASS. FINAL AI Work Tick once PASS. Only then test 2-minute live loop.

Formula/view pages are frozen unless crash proof exists: QueueView, OpenSlotView, OverflowView, OverflowSlotView, DeadView. Do not replace formulas just because a header looks different. Do not rebuild the workbook mid-build. Use screenshots/runlog/source audit first. Header-only fixes are allowed only when a V19K proof/state task writes past a label and user approves.

Phone proof order: 1. APP Config Setup. 2. APP Status Snapshot. 3. Confirm required sheets/tabs only, no formula edits. 4. AIW SELFTEST All Proof Tools. 5. AIW SELFTEST State Tools 100. 6. APP Reset Locks. 7. FINAL Simple, 1 real TextNow notification. 8. Ghost row/duplicate check. 9. FINAL Process Sheet. 10. FINAL Send Sheet. 11. FINAL AI Work Tick once. 12. Live loop only after all gates PASS.

Use this when context feels thin: Ask user to refresh memory with current XML, runlog, sheet screenshot, or source notes before changing anything. Never assume from old V19H/V19I/V19J alone. Use personal/project memory and the active source file together. If source file and memory disagree, stop and ask for current proof.

Between-chat truth: ChatGPT does not run between chats unless an automation/external runner is created. The source file must carry the rules, bug bank, and worker notes so future chats can reload them. Read-only runners may scan for risks, missing sheets, banned routes, literal variables, JSON toggles, and missing refs. Do not let a runner modify TextNow UI or working formulas without explicit approval.

Generate future issues before fixes: 1 missing sheet, 2 wrong header, 3 formula tab touched, 4 ghost row, 5 duplicate, 6 stale reply, 7 wrong recipient, 8 locked PROCESSING, 9 locked SENDING, 10 Busy stuck, 11 SafeMode ON, 12 OpenAI fail, 13 bad model, 14 JSON malformed, 15 literal variable, 16 sender blank, 17 ticker-only, 18 name-only, 19 phone-number formatting, 20 TextNow search fail, 21 contact pick fail, 22 AutoInput delay, 23 Archive literal, 24 DeadArchive literal, 25 compactor risk, 26 overflow full, 27 open slot bad, 28 QueueView stale, 29 OpenSlot formula crash, 30 DeadView formula crash, 31 retry loop, 32 no retry cap, 33 old rows slow, 34 backpressure wrong, 35 helper mode wrong, 36 two-device conflict, 37 command misfire, 38 outbound mismatch, 39 Brain missing, 40 Preset wrong, 41 context too long, 42 tone generic, 43 privacy exposure, 44 key printed, 45 banned route, 46 missing task ref, 47 duplicate task names, 48 popup debug left on, 49 self-loop on, 50 test order skipped.
Loaded. Use before fixes. Finds likely next bugs before phone proof.
100x matrix loaded. Full list is in worker notes/source package.
Long popups are not primary memory. Use XML flags + worker notes.
Before fixing: require screenshot/runlog/source proof for that layer.
Formula/view tabs and phone UI stay frozen unless crash proof exists.
Before heavy work: verify XML contents, task count, refs, banned routes.
Loaded. Re-check old bug families before making new changes.

Action.Str: ROW:%SSRealRow SEARCH:%QCTickWorkSearch PROCESS:%PSFinalStatus REPLYVALID:%PSReplyValid SEND:%SSResult AUDIT:%QSAResult

PASS: R4A app tick one-work path is clean.
%QCTickWorkDetails

FAIL/HOLD: R4A app tick one-work issue.
%QCTickWorkError
%QCTickWorkDetails
Do not run live/timer.
R4A2 test order is embedded in task 295 and source delta.

R4A2 TIMER TRANSITION TEST ORDER - SOURCE EMBEDDED
Prereq: R4A1 full gate PASS. Sheet1 must be clean unless a test says EXACTLY ONE NEW ROW.
1) Run QC R4A2 Embedded Test Order. Expected: PASS/info only. 2) Run QC R4A2 Timer Cleanup Reset. Expected: all live/timer profiles OFF, locks reset. 3) Run QC Timer Entry Single-Tick No-Work Proof. Expected: Task72 -> FINAL Queue Cycle, no work, no send, locks reset. 4) Add exactly one NEW row, zero READY/SENDING/PROCESSING. Run QC R4A2 Timer Entry One-Work Proof. Expected: Task72 path sends one row NEW->DONE. 5) Clean sheet: zero NEW/READY/SENDING/PROCESSING. Run QC R4A2 Timer Profile No-Work ARM+CHECK. Expected: actual 2m profile path fires, no send, NO_READY/NO_NEW_ROWS, locks reset. 6) Only after #5 PASS, add exactly one NEW row. Run QC R4A2 Timer Profile One-Work ARM+CHECK. Expected: actual timer profile sends one row, then resets. 7) Run QC R4A2 Post Gate State Audit. Expected: no active rows, timer off, locks reset.
STOP ON FAIL: any FAIL/HOLD popup, AutoSheets error, wrong row, stuck READY/SENDING/PROCESSING, dirty UI, lock stuck, more than one send, timer does not fire, or timer double-fires.
DO NOT RUN: APP Start, APP Run Tick Once manually, live TextNow trigger, Archive, DeadArchive, Compactor, TT5.
PROMOTE only after runlog + popup proof for all required R4A2 tests.
